ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "model_size" REAL /* Size of the model */,
  "training_dataset" TEXT /* The dataset used for training the model */,
  "features" TEXT /* A list of features used in the model */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the model was trained */,
  "training_start_date" TEXT /* The date when training started */,
  "training_end_date" TEXT /* The date when training ended */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* The current deployment status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* The current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* A list of team members involved in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_description" TEXT /* Description of the client */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* The name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The email address of the primary contact person */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* The type of client (e.g., enterprise, startup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "fa" REAL /* False positives of the model */,
  "d2h" REAL /* Distance to hyperplane of the model */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* The ROC AUC score */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* The confusion matrix in a serialized format */,
  "cross_val_score" REAL /* The cross-validation score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* The status of the model version (e.g., in development, released) */,
  "version_creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the metric belongs to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model version */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model version */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model version */,
  "fa" REAL /* False positives of the model version */,
  "d2h" REAL /* Distance to hyperplane of the model version */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1 score of the model version */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model version */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* The ROC AUC score */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* The confusion matrix in a serialized format */,
  "cross_val_score" REAL /* The cross-validation score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, client) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A list of permissions assigned to the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* The type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the rating (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
